label: Symphony Talent Employer Brand Comparative Audit Project Data Bundle

metadata.description: Interactive Employer Brand Competitive Audit SPA reference with KILOS, summary, competition, and deep-dive views.
metadata.notes: SPA targets are page elements within rendered views, not full browser screenshots.

companies.name: Symphony Talent

kilos_dimensions.interpretation: The fixture copy connects employee work to helping employers reach candidates with more relevant experiences.
The message emphasizes craft, recruitment marketing technology, and client partnership as professional expertise signals.

source_coverage.summary: One local careers-site hero fixture is available for the client company.
No Glassdoor, Indeed, or other review-platform evidence is present in this local slice.

caveats: This company audit cites only one local Browser Evidence registry row.
The fixture is not a live-web capture and does not support market-current claims.
Review-site coverage is unavailable in this slice.
Review platforms are required in the full workflow but are outside this first local fixture slice.

companies.name: Phenom

kilos_dimensions.interpretation: The fixture centers intelligent experiences, product pace, and customer outcomes as the employee impact story.
The copy points to collaborative problem solving across teams, which is the clearest available kinship signal in the local evidence.

source_coverage.summary: One local careers-site culture card fixture is available for this competitor.
No Glassdoor, Indeed, or other review-platform evidence is present in this local slice.

companies.name: Radancy

kilos_dimensions.interpretation: The fixture emphasizes enterprise programs, global reach, scale, and established client work as reputation proof points.
Specialist recruitment marketing expertise is the clearest development and professional mastery signal in the available evidence.

source_coverage.summary: One local careers-site proof block fixture is available for this competitor.
No Glassdoor, Indeed, or other review-platform evidence is present in this local slice.

caveats: This company audit cites only one local Browser Evidence registry row.
The fixture is not a live-web capture and does not support market-current claims.
Review-site coverage is unavailable in this slice.
Review platforms are required in the full workflow but are outside this first local fixture slice.

kilos_dimensions.synthesis: Impact is a shared category, but Symphony Talent and Phenom carry clearer impact narratives in this fixture slice.
Opportunity is present as expertise and exposure, but none of the local fixtures prove concrete career progression or internal mobility.
Kinship is the weakest comparative dimension in the local evidence, with Phenom holding the clearest available signal.
Status is Radancy's strongest relative lane in this fixture set.
Lifestyle is unavailable across the comparative fixture and should not be inferred from the current evidence.

caveats: This comparative audit cites only the three local Company Brand Audit fixtures and their Browser Evidence request IDs.
The fixture is not a live-web comparative audit and does not support market-current claims.
Review-site, benefits, employee story, and career-mobility evidence are unavailable in this slice.
The file is read-only provenance/source metadata, not a generated report or viewer payload.
